---
layout: default
title: "National Political Brief: July 10, 2026"
date: 2026-07-10T16:35:58.015433+00:00
summary: "Parliament advances \"One Nation, One Election\" for 2029, while political shifts and legal challenges regarding temple donations and statehood dominate headlines"
run_time_ist: "10:05PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:05PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>One Nation, One Election:</strong> A parliamentary panel chief indicated that the &quot;One Nation, One Election&quot; framework could be operational in time for the 2029 general elections.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>TMC to BJP defections:</strong> Three former Trinamool Congress MPs joined the BJP and were immediately fielded by the party as candidates for upcoming Rajya Sabha bypolls.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxPNzk1a2lVNGhuQTlmWUpNMGwzaDRQV0xpUlM5LWtjOU9jNXpsQmRadHliLVlzTl9xSGd1a1pvVlYwdmtTSC16UHpfdFlkdUMzb3F3SVE0dnI2bl9mNU8xbmZvZWhIZDNUcTBSa0c0clE3YlI4YUFkVDlnR1lYMU9aTQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiygFBVV95cUxNN01EMHRJc2VTUFpLckNtc1VxRXV6bDVJeVFlTVMxSXlhN3d4Sk9Zc2gtMTlFd2k4ZXMxT0d6YUU3MFlOaGNsV1hkWjZWWktWLWwxV3NORUh5M0RIQlR3ZU5MZDA0Qk9pYnVoVEVsdFFsbnd2MWNqOUxWNU1sMGVQRk5Sclhjc2IxVW5VSkp4WHFqTWc3amdFUlNSOXVoZzFHdUcweEZObGl6NDZKWW9xQ3lNWHBoQnVMU3p6OUhZeHZSU2NNMm14OG53?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Ayodhya donation probe:</strong> The Supreme Court is scheduled to hear petitions on July 13 seeking an independent CBI investigation into alleged financial irregularities regarding Ram Temple donations.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitgFBVV95cUxQVWV6M0tQSmt6TDlGNTdvZ015T3dMbmwwNmFRaEllOHVFQUNvMEtBcjVzdmY3cmxTYXB3Z2dtWkJ1ZWlnVGVtdDNRUWpEV0UzRzVVcHJSeTIwaHNGMlFsa1lpSXV1MnRfb20zcTV5ZER4bWliTklNdkNhU0FYMHFEQkF2cTRFM0RqSjZfaFF0NHgyNEc3X2dwSTI5a2VUS0ZQSGZTNUxpcEFHY1FmYWxaS19CRDZpQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Transgender rights legislation:</strong> Parliament has officially passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, following its approval in the Rajya Sabha.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxQNnVqemJMNjQ0d0xKbjhQYnFCcU1QWmp6NVRwQkJrZnFqSVFwUHRpZERwT2pVMFRkT0pxTVc5dFlWNUVNbXhKOGNxRmlhTmRsbURhRWdMb2JUcTJzWlNzbVZnVUlTaENEOVFYdHRrbFBPbWMwQ3E0VEVtVTlQZnV0NmY0aG5USzVSVk90R3Q5TlJOVjN2b1Z5dTlXS09IRXkzWWY0Si1JYkxiQklsVDVWSU5CYkc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Higher education policy:</strong> The Congress party is urging NDA-led states to oppose the proposed VBSA Bill, characterizing the legislation as detrimental to the higher education sector.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivgFBVV95cUxQc1RXUGtSUzh4c1ItcjRackZFTFMybjM4Y09RS2hSZlBac2h6WlFtNU1xRVpYX3BFQnF0WGc0b09ybHFxZ3pUR0cyUnVsU3hhMjA1SXpSdENlSFFZQXo1cTUzZ1UyN1k5Qi01TGY2TVhVOHhpRlUzQXU3U0RDLXI5LXd4M0FiRVI3eG03ZWxKUjJfQ0xSRXNDTkJXSThVUHdhdHgxWHZvQUJwZXFzVzRYR3NVbUVCQy0zRG5ZdjZR0gG-AUFVX3lxTFBzVFdQa1JTOHhzUi1yNFpyRkVMUzJuMzhjT1FLaFJmUFpzaHpaUW01TXFFWlhfcEVCcXRYZzRvT3JscXFnelRHRzJSdWxTeGEyMDVJelJ0Q2VIUVlBejVxNTNnVTI3WTlCLTVMZjZNWFU4eGlGVTNBdTdTREMtcjktd3gzQWJFUjd4bTdlbEpSMl9DTFJFc0NOQldJOFVQd2F0eDFYdm9BQnBlcXNXNFhHc1VtRUJDLTNEbll2NlE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxQNnVqemJMNjQ0d0xKbjhQYnFCcU1QWmp6NVRwQkJrZnFqSVFwUHRpZERwT2pVMFRkT0pxTVc5dFlWNUVNbXhKOGNxRmlhTmRsbURhRWdMb2JUcTJzWlNzbVZnVUlTaENEOVFYdHRrbFBPbWMwQ3E0VEVtVTlQZnV0NmY0aG5USzVSVk90R3Q5TlJOVjN2b1Z5dTlXS09IRXkzWWY0Si1JYkxiQklsVDVWSU5CYkc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W6</a></span></li>
</ul>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxQNnVqemJMNjQ0d0xKbjhQYnFCcU1QWmp6NVRwQkJrZnFqSVFwUHRpZERwT2pVMFRkT0pxTVc5dFlWNUVNbXhKOGNxRmlhTmRsbURhRWdMb2JUcTJzWlNzbVZnVUlTaENEOVFYdHRrbFBPbWMwQ3E0VEVtVTlQZnV0NmY0aG5USzVSVk90R3Q5TlJOVjN2b1Z5dTlXS09IRXkzWWY0Si1JYkxiQklsVDVWSU5CYkc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W6] Jairam Ramesh calls for NDA states to reject VBSA Bill in Parliament - The News Mill</a> The News Mill</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W7] Assembly elections likely in mid-2029 after delimitation, Congress to retain power: Chief Minister A. Revanth Reddy - The Hindu</a> The Hindu</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxQN28tSm5oVHJiWjZ2ME9WRWpub1NoS2trbVBZX1JnbmtGbjFTSnpiM3pmWWxVQWY5Nzl4ZER3WTliSUkwZmJJb1pjUlY0TS11RlZtdjVnbjdfOXFTQWxDcmUySGhlUFBsaGlfaHpTYUpGeFVick1vUnJLQ3lxbmItN05hRnUyWnRZMXh4U2pSZ01uM1AzQnp5U2NTd2xvcHVQX0kyTDJPRFlpQzEtVXc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W8] BJP nominates Ashutosh Tiwari for Datia by-election in Madhya Pradesh - The News Mill</a> The News Mill</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W9] Madhya Pradesh: BJP fields Ashutosh Tiwari for Datia by-election, drops Narottam Mishra - ANI News</a> ANI News</li>

</details>
